input: We deploy a customer-service chatbot to help users navigate our public website FAQ.

expected.notes: Article 50(1) chatbot transparency path. This is a low-risk, non-high-risk system (customer-service FAQ navigation is not within any Annex III paragraph — no biometrics, no critical infrastructure, no employment / essential-services decision-making, no law-enforcement / migration / justice / democracy use). Article 5 prohibitions do not fire. The lexicon term 'chatbot' (article_50_gpai.1_interaction_disclosure) triggers Article 50(1) transparency: end users must be informed that they are interacting with an AI system. All Day-3/4 cascade modules (Art 10/12/13/14/15) return applicable=false because high_risk===false. Three-category overlay therefore has applicable_categories=[] (the high-risk obligation overlay does not apply). EUR-Lex grounding: Art 50(1) chapeau + Annex III + Art 6(3) limitations.
